pr.title: PR #141 — Execution Artifact Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **execution-artifact** layer on top of the Execution Result Framework (#140), continuing the deterministic execution roadmap: `… → Result → Artifact`. Where the result layer represents *what an attempt produced*, this layer represents *the artifacts produced or referenced by those results*. Clean **v1** — no prior `execution_artifact` module/CLI exists, so no `-v2` suffixing needed.

Observational/declarative only: consumes ExecutionResult + ExecutionAttempt v2 + CapabilityKnowledgeGraph **read-only**. Per non-goals it does **not** generate artifacts, scan files, upload, execute, orchestrate, schedule, optimize, or assign workers — it only records, validates, dedups, orders, and aggregates artifact records. Revit 2024 baseline unaffected.

New module `src/axiom_core/execution_artifact.py` mirrors the established pattern (`ExecutionArtifact` / `ExecutionArtifactReference` / `ExecutionArtifactReport` / `ExecutionArtifactEvidence` / `ExecutionArtifactEngine`):

- **Artifact**: `artifact_id, result_id, attempt_id, capability_id, artifact_type, status, artifact_path, artifact_url, references, summary, created_at, schema_version, raw_payload`
- **Types**: `FILE / REPORT / LOG / SCREENSHOT / RECORDING / EVIDENCE_BUNDLE / TEST_OUTPUT / PR_COMMENT / OTHER`
- **Statuses**: `CREATED / REFERENCED / MISSING / INVALID / UNKNOWN`
- **Reference types**: `RESULT / ATTEMPT / CAPABILITY / FILE / URL / VALIDATION / KNOWLEDGE_NODE / OTHER`
- **Report**: `artifact_count, status_counts, artifact_type_counts, missing_count, invalid_count, created_count, referenced_count, duplicate_artifact_count`

Deterministic ordering, dedup, and pass/fail gate:

```
sort key  = (result_id, attempt_id, capability_id, artifact_type, status, artifact_id)
dedup key = (result_id, attempt_id, capability_id, artifact_type, artifact_path, artifact_url)  # keep first in sorted order, count surplus
passed    = artifact_count > 0 and missing_count == 0 and invalid_count == 0   # empty report -> fail
```

CLI (4 commands, JSON/Markdown/CSV exports), registered in `command_registry.py`:

```
axiom execution-artifact-create [--artifact-file <af>] [--json-output]
axiom execution-artifacts [--json-output]
axiom execution-artifact-show <report_id> [--json-output]
axiom execution-artifact-export <report_id> [--format markdown|json|csv]
```

Evidence bundle always written under `artifacts/execution_artifact/<run_id>/` (5 files: `execution_artifact_request.json`, `execution_artifact_result.json`, `execution_artifact_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json`, `report.json`); directory git-ignored.

## Validation

- **New tests:** +57 (`tests/test_execution_artifact.py`, 72 cases) + `test_command_registry.py`/`test_selection_engine` updates
- **Full pytest:** `poetry run pytest -q` → **4917 passed, 1 skipped** (baseline 4860 at #140)
- **Ruff:** `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → 0 errors
- **CLI smoke (shell-authoritative):** adversarial fixture (5 artifacts → 1 case-insensitive duplicate `(res-1,att-1,cap-1,FILE,out/a.txt)`, 1 MISSING, 1 INVALID, lowercase types/statuses, out-of-order refs) → artifact_count 4 / missing 1 / invalid 1 / created 1 / referenced 1 / duplicate 1; status `{CREATED:1,INVALID:1,MISSING:1,REFERENCED:1}`; deterministic order; show round-trips identically; markdown/CSV(header+4 artifacts+2 refs=7 rows)/JSON exports valid; error paths show-missing exit 2, traversal exit 1; pass_fail `false` adversarial, `true` clean, `false` empty

## What did NOT change

- No modification to ExecutionResult (#140) or any prior layer
- No execution / orchestration / scheduling / optimization / worker assignment / artifact generation / file scanning / uploading / network calls / architecture changes
- Revit 2024 baseline unaffected


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
